name: pixel-pet-launcher-ui-pack

sheets.purpose: large console shell, top bar, screen bezel, side panels, controller dock, small window controls, decorative vents and brackets
start/stop/switch/settings buttons, d-pad, toggles, progress bars, resource pills, status dots, app icons
central screen background, pixel city window scene, desk props, lamp, plant, handheld console, drink, cushion, skyline strips
pet cartridge cards, avatar frames, status/path/behavior/recent panels, labels, meters, toast and modal frames

recommendedPipeline: Slice large reusable frames and controls from the sheets.
Keep text, pet status, progress values, and launch paths rendered by code.
Use scene-props-sheet.png as the main source for the central screen background.
Use real pet transparent sprites from src/renderer/assets/portraits on top of generated UI assets.
